LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER SHEEHAN MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES FAILED TO MEET AND CONFER "IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5(A). THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY OCTOBER 27, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER SHEEHAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. THE JORGENSEN DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5.(SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS) THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH HE STATUTE. MOVANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JANUARY 13, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER SHEEHAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The Jorgensen declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred in person or by telephone in compliance with CCP 435.5. The declaration indicates that the parties exchanged e-mails and plaintiff's counsel never returned the phone call of defense counsel. The parties are ordered to comply with he statute. Movant's response to the complaint is now due by January 13, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Continued To Feb-08-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER SHEEHAN Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint

Off calendar. The parties failed to meet and confer "in person or by telephone" in compliance with CCP 435.5(a). The parties are ordered to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by October 27, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
